title: Section 475
content: It shall be the duty of all police officers to give immediate information to the Commissioner 1 *** of the commission of, or the attempt to commit any offence against this Act or any rule, regulation or bye-law made thereunder and to assist all municipal officers and other municipal employees in the exercise of their lawful authority.
footnote: 1. The words "or any other appropriate municipal authority" omitted by Act 67 of 1993, s. 117 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).
